common.debug_notification_details: Details: open the report file (text + JSON appendix).

invalid_config_entry.message: Config entry "{config_entry}" was not found or is not a DeepSeek Conversation entry.

user.title: DeepSeek API Configuration
user.description: Connect to the DeepSeek API. Default model is DeepSeek V4 Flash. Legacy names deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner still work but are removed after 2026-07-24 — switch to V4 in options when ready.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate DeepSeek
reauth_confirm.description: Your DeepSeek API key was rejected. Enter a valid API key to restore the integration.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure DeepSeek
reconfigure.description: Update your API key or base URL. Assist and model settings stay unchanged.

abort.config_entry_not_available: The config entry is no longer available.

init.title: DeepSeek Options
init.description: Assist, model, and API behaviour. To change your API key or base URL, use the integration card menu (⋮ → Reconfigure).

data_description.thinking_enabled: When on, the API uses reasoning effort; temperature and top_p are ignored.
data_description.reasoning_effort: Only used when reasoning is enabled.
data_description.temperature: Only used when reasoning is disabled.
data_description.top_p: Only used when reasoning is disabled.
data_description.chat_model: Legacy IDs deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner work until 2026-07-24.
data_description.max_tool_iterations: Maximum API rounds when the model calls Home Assistant tools (1–20). Each round can run one or more tools.
data_description.vision_enabled: When on, Assist can send image attachments and generate_content can use filenames. Requires a vision-capable model (V4 Flash/Pro). Advertises SUPPORT_ATTACHMENTS to Home Assistant when available.
data_description.context_management_enabled: When on, large Home Assistant tool results (e.g. GetLiveContext) are shortened before sending to the API to reduce context-limit errors.
data_description.max_tool_result_chars: Maximum characters per tool result JSON (default 12000). Set to 0 to disable truncation. Only applies when context management is enabled.
data_description.max_history_rounds: Maximum user turns kept in Assist history (default 0 = unlimited). Older complete rounds are dropped before each API call; the system prompt and the current round including tool chains stay intact.

generate_content.name: Generate content
generate_content.description: Send a prompt to DeepSeek and return the model reply. Optional per-call overrides for model, temperature, thinking, max_tokens, and JSON response format.

config_entry.name: Integration entry
config_entry.description: DeepSeek Conversation config entry to use.

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: User message sent to the model.

chat_model.name: Model
chat_model.description: Override the model for this call only. Uses the integration option when omitted.

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description: Override sampling temperature (0–2). Ignored when thinking is enabled for this call. Uses the integration option when omitted.

thinking_enabled.name: Enable reasoning
thinking_enabled.description: Override reasoning for this call only. When enabled, temperature and top_p from the integration are not sent.

max_tokens.name: Max tokens
max_tokens.description: Override the reply token limit for this call only.

response_format.name: Response format
response_format.description: Set to json_object to request a JSON object reply from the model.

filenames.name: File paths
filenames.description: Optional local image paths (must be allowed in allowlist_external_dirs).

run_debug.name: Run DeepSeek debug suite
run_debug.description: Exhaustive diagnostics: environment, HTTP probe, optional models.list, registered HA LLM APIs, entity registry, many non-stream and stream completion checks (thinking on/off, system message, multi-turn, JSON mode, parallel pings), log excerpt, and a JSON appendix in the report file. Many short API calls; writes /config/deepseek_conversation_debug_report.txt and a brief notification (summary + failures).

config_entry.name: Integration entry
config_entry.description: DeepSeek Conversation config entry to test.

log_tail_lines.name: Log excerpt size
log_tail_lines.description: Filtered log lines appended from home-assistant.log (default 600, allowed 50–8000).
